summary: Add a safe React markdown-lite renderer for AI prose and fenced code blocks, avoiding HTML injection while retaining proposal extraction and diff review.

decisions.decision: Render prose and fenced code as React text nodes and pre/code elements only; do not evaluate or inject assistant HTML.
decisions.rationale: AI responses are untrusted provider content. A small renderer satisfies the visible markdown/code-block surface without introducing an unsafe HTML path.

testEvidence.criterion: Markdown-lite rendering and the diff-reviewed conversation panel remain green.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused markdown and conversation panel suites once after the renderer integration.

red.outcome: RED: the safe renderer module was not yet present before this unit began.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/ai/AiMarkdown.test.tsx tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 2 passed (2); Tests 3 passed (3); Duration 953ms.

testEvidence.criterion: The renderer remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after integration.

red.outcome: RED: markdown rendering was not yet integrated.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 431 files in 237ms with source policy passed.

questions: Full CommonMark parity, copy/insert actions, and hosted AI walkthrough remain separate acceptance work.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
